data.title: Wire merge_config_file and merge_ci_workflow into dso-setup.sh install path
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
SC5 remediation: Add merge_config_file and merge_ci_workflow calls to dso-setup.sh install path. Add tests to test-dso-setup.sh.

### Implementation
1. In dso-setup.sh, add merge_config_file call when existing config detected
2. Replace _run_ci_guard_analysis with merge_ci_workflow when existing CI workflow detected
3. Add tests: test_install_calls_merge_config_file, test_install_calls_merge_ci_workflow

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh
- tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] dso-setup.sh calls merge_config_file during install
  Verify: grep -q 'merge_config_file' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh
- [ ] dso-setup.sh calls merge_ci_workflow during install
  Verify: grep -q 'merge_ci_workflow' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
